title: Initialization, Indeterminate Values, and Undefined Behavior · Memory-Safety Defense
summary: A safety board presents unfamiliar initialization, indeterminate values, and undefined behavior decisions across code, diagrams, diagnostics, and stakeholder evidence; each distractor corresponds to a named misconception. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for defined-state initialization audit. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Initialize every read-reachable scalar, member, padding-sensitive operation, and error-path state before use.
Avoid evaluating indeterminate values and understand when unsigned-char inspection is and is not permitted.
Explain how undefined behavior removes semantic constraints and invalidates debug-build intuition.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Initialization State Machine
steps.instruction:
Order the Initialization State Machine evidence cycle for this quiz task before implementing it.

Evidence target: Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Initialization State Machine.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Initialization State Machine assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Initialization State Machine, keep Initialization State Machine connected to executable C memory invariant and explicit native transfer evidence.

content.text: A quiz native-systems team handles memory case 1438. Produce bounded C evidence to read only fields proven initialized by state; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Initialize every read-reachable scalar, member, padding-sensitive operation, and error-path state before use.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Initialization State Machine has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.
